utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: (1) health_coverage with costs, (2) property_coverage with costs, (3) travel_coverage with costs, (4) additional_services with costs, and (5) total_budget with full cost breakdown. In the final coverage plan, all 5 headings are present. However, property_coverage, travel_coverage, and additional_services only list 'included_in_package: true' but do not specify any actual costs. Since the format explicitly requires costs for each coverage item, only health_coverage (which has a monthly cost) and total_budget (which has monthly and annual costs) are fully specified according to the requirement. Therefore, 2 of 5 items are fully covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three main insurance types: health_coverage (LifeFirst Standard Health Plan8), property_coverage (no explicit plan name but implied LifeFirst Standard Coverage based on coverage details), and travel_coverage (no explicit plan name but matches LifeFirst Standard Plan features). The 'additional_services' include items like Wellness programs, Telemedicine, and Concierge and emergency coordination which can be mapped to their corresponding ratings in the 'health_enhancement_services' and 'travel_enhancement_services' sections. From the ground-truth data: 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (physical health) has rating 9 and (mental health) rating 4; 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' for property has rating 9; 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for travel has rating 9; 'Telemedicine Services' has rating 10; 'Wellness Programs' has rating 3; and 'Concierge Services' has rating 1.

final_package_text:
{
  "health_coverage": {
    "plan_name": "LifeFirst Standard Health Plan8",
    "coverage": [
      "Physical and mental health",
      "Preventive care",
      "Psychiatry services",
      "Crisis intervention",
      "Stress management programs",
      "Gym reimbursement",
      "Prescription coverage"
    ],
    "monthly_cost": 185.0,
    "deductible_percentage": 5.0,
    "coverage_limit": 3000.0,
    "global_coverage": true
  },
  "property_coverage": {
    "coverage": [
      "Business equipment (photography gear)",
      "Electronics coverage",
      "Liability protection",
      "Natural disaster coverage"
    ],
    "included_in_package": true
  },
  "travel_coverage": {
    "coverage": [
      "Adventure sports",
      "Medical evacuation",
      "Business travel protection",
      "Trip cancellation",
      "Baggage protection",
      "Travel delay compensation",
      "Extended stay coverage",
      "Emergency coordination"
    ],
    "included_in_package": true
  },
  "additional_services": {
    "services": [
      "Wellness programs",
      "Telemedicine",
      "24/7 multilingual support",
      "Concierge and emergency coordination",
      "Priority claims and direct billing"
    ],
    "included_in_package": true
  },
  "total_budget": {
    "monthly_cost": 185.0,
    "annual_cost": 2220.0,
    "annual_savings_vs_previous": 391.8
  }
}
